TwitterConfigurations.description: Pass this object in platformSpecificData when posting to Twitter/X, including Community post options.

communityId.description: Community ID to publish this post into.

shareWithFollowers.description: When posting to a Community, also share the post with followers.

threadItems.description: Additional tweets to chain as a thread. The root tweet uses post.content.

content.description: Text of this thread tweet (max 280 chars)

thumbnail.description: Thumbnail image URL for video items. Supported on YouTube regular videos (not Shorts). JPEG, PNG, or GIF, max 2 MB, min 640 px wide.

poll.description: Cannot be combined with media or threadItems.

durationMinutes.description: Poll duration in minutes (5 min – 7 days).

YouTubeConfigurations.description: Pass this object in platformSpecificData when posting to YouTube.

title.description: Video title (max 100 chars, no < or >). Defaults to first 100 chars of content, or "Untitled Video".

tags.description: Video tags. Total characters across all tags must be ≤500.

visibility.description: Who can see the video. Defaults to "public". Scheduled posts upload as private and flip to this value at publish time.

madeForKids.description: COPPA compliance flag. Setting to true permanently disables comments, notification bell, personalized ads, end screens, and cards on the video. Defaults to false.

containsSyntheticMedia.description: AI-generated content disclosure. YouTube is increasingly enforcing this requirement. Defaults to false.

categoryId.description: YouTube category ID. Defaults to "22" (People & Blogs). Common values: "1" Film & Animation, "10" Music, "20" Gaming, "22" People & Blogs, "27" Education, "28" Science & Technology.

firstComment.description: Auto-posted comment after the video goes live. Max 10,000 characters. For publishNow posts: posted immediately after upload. For scheduled posts: posted when the video becomes public.

TikTokConfigurations.description: Pass this object in platformSpecificData when posting to TikTok.

privacyLevel.description: Who can see this post. Defaults to "PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE".

disableComment.description: Disable comments on this post. Defaults to false.

disableDuet.description: Disable duet for this video. Videos only. Defaults to false.

disableStitch.description: Disable stitch for this video. Videos only. Defaults to false.

brandContentToggle.description: Mark as branded content (paid partnership). Defaults to false.

brandOrganicToggle.description: Mark as organic brand promotion. Defaults to false.

isAigc.description: AI-generated content disclosure. Videos only. Defaults to false.

videoCoverTimestampMs.description: Timestamp in milliseconds to use as the video cover frame. Videos only.

autoAddMusic.description: Automatically add background music to photo carousels. Photo posts only. Defaults to true.

photoCoverIndex.description: 0-indexed position of the cover image in a photo carousel. Photo posts only. Defaults to 0.

description.description: Separate description for a TikTok photo or carousel post. Max 4,000 characters. When omitted, the post content is also used as the description. Photo posts only.

draft.description: When true, sends content to the creator's TikTok inbox as a draft. Defaults to false (publishes immediately via DIRECT_POST).

PinterestConfigurations.description: Pass this object in platformSpecificData when posting to Pinterest.

boardId.description: Target board ID. Retrieve available boards via GET /v1/pinterest/boards.

title.description: Pin title. Max 100 characters. Defaults to first line of content.

link.description: HTTPS destination URL when the pin is clicked. Important for driving traffic.

dominantColor.description: Hex color for the loading placeholder (e.g. "#6E7874").

coverImageUrl.description: Custom cover image URL for video pins.

LinkedInConfigurations.description: Pass this object in platformSpecificData when posting to LinkedIn.

visibility.description: Post visibility. "PUBLIC" = visible to everyone, "CONNECTIONS" = visible to connections only. Defaults to "PUBLIC".

articleUrl.description: URL for an article/link post. When provided, the post becomes a link share with a preview card.

articleTitle.description: Title for the article preview card. Max 400 characters.

articleDescription.description: Description for the article preview card. Max 400 characters.

documentTitle.description: Title shown on the document card when posting a PDF. Required by LinkedIn when a document media item is included.

BlueskyConfigurations.description: Pass this object in platformSpecificData when posting to Bluesky.

langs.description: BCP-47 language tags for the post (e.g. ["en"], ["en-US", "es"]). Defaults to ["en"].

altText.description: Alt text for each image, in the same order as mediaItems. Strongly encouraged for accessibility.

FacebookConfigurations.description: Pass this object in platformSpecificData when posting to Facebook Pages.

link.description: When provided on a text-only post, Facebook renders a link preview card from this URL's Open Graph tags. Ignored when mediaItems are attached.

published.description: When false, the post is created on the Page in unpublished/draft state — useful for staging or scheduling via Facebook's own composer. Defaults to true.

videoThumbnailUrl.description: Video posts only. Public URL of an image Facebook will use as the video's cover/thumbnail. Applied as a follow-up call after publish — if the upload fails, the post still succeeds (Facebook just auto-picks a frame). Ignored when no video is attached.

InstagramConfigurations.description: Pass this object in platformSpecificData when posting to Instagram Business accounts. All fields are optional and apply to Reels/video posts; image posts ignore them.

shareToFeed.description: Reels-only. When true (default), the Reel also appears in the account's main feed grid. Set false to publish to Reels only.

coverUrl.description: Video-only. Public URL of an image Instagram will use as the cover frame for the Reel/video post. Ignored for image posts.

thumbOffset.description: Video-only. Timestamp in milliseconds Instagram extracts as the cover frame. Ignored when coverUrl is set or for image posts.

ThreadsConfigurations.description: Pass this object in platformSpecificData when posting to Threads.

replyControl.description: Who can reply to this thread. Defaults to "everyone" when omitted.

altText.description: Alt text for each image, in the same order as mediaItems. Strongly encouraged for accessibility.

GoogleBusinessConfigurations.description: Pass this object in platformSpecificData when posting to Google Business Profile. Posts appear on Google Search and Maps.

topicType.description: Post type. Defaults to STANDARD. Use EVENT for event posts, OFFER for promotional offer posts.

callToActionType.description: Call-to-action button shown on the post.

callToActionUrl.description: URL for the call-to-action. Required for all CTA types except CALL.

eventTitle.description: Event title. Required when topicType is EVENT.

eventStartDate.description: Event start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Required when topicType is EVENT.

eventStartTime.description: Event start time in HH:MM (24-hour) format. Required when topicType is EVENT.

eventEndDate.description: Event end date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Required when topicType is EVENT.

eventEndTime.description: Event end time in HH:MM (24-hour) format. Required when topicType is EVENT.

offerRedeemOnlineUrl.description: Online redemption URL for OFFER posts.

offerTermsConditions.description: Terms and conditions text for OFFER posts.

content.description: Post text body

thumbnail.description: Thumbnail image URL for video items. Supported on YouTube regular videos (not Shorts). JPEG, PNG, or GIF, max 2 MB, min 640 px wide.

platforms.description: Target platform accounts to publish to

content.description: Optional per-platform text override. Use when you want to change the text for this platform because different platforms talk differently. When omitted, the top-level `content` is used.
Optional per-platform text override. Use when you want to change the text for this platform because different platforms talk differently. When omitted, the top-level `content` is used.
Optional per-platform text override. Use when you want to change the text for this platform because different platforms talk differently. When omitted, the top-level `content` is used.
Optional per-platform text override. Use when you want to change the text for this platform because different platforms talk differently. When omitted, the top-level `content` is used.
Optional per-platform text override. Use when you want to change the text for this platform because different platforms talk differently. When omitted, the top-level `content` is used.
Optional per-platform text override. Use when you want to change the text for this platform because different platforms talk differently. When omitted, the top-level `content` is used.
Optional per-platform text override. Use when you want to change the text for this platform because different platforms talk differently. When omitted, the top-level `content` is used.
Optional per-platform text override. Use when you want to change the text for this platform because different platforms talk differently. When omitted, the top-level `content` is used.
Optional per-platform text override. Use when you want to change the text for this platform because different platforms talk differently. When omitted, the top-level `content` is used.
Optional per-platform text override. Use when you want to change the text for this platform because different platforms talk differently. When omitted, the top-level `content` is used.

publishNow.description: Publish immediately. Required when scheduledFor is omitted.

scheduledFor.description: ISO 8601 datetime to schedule the post for future publishing

timezone.description: IANA timezone for the scheduled time (e.g. America/New_York). Defaults to UTC.

get.summary: Verify that the provided access key is valid
Get pending LinkedIn account choices for headless mode
get.description: Use only when starting LinkedIn OAuth with headless=true and the callback redirects to your redirectUri with status=selection_required and selectionToken. Returns the personal profile and organization pages available for the user to choose from.

post.summary: Save selected LinkedIn accounts for headless mode
post.description: Use only after GET /v1/connect/linkedin/selection/:token in a headless LinkedIn connect flow. Saves the selected personal profile and/or organization pages, then invalidates the one-time selection token.

id.description: Use this as accountId when creating posts

platformUserId.description: The user ID on the platform, or null if not yet retrieved

username.description: The public username or handle, including @ for handle-based platforms

displayName.description: Human-readable display name of the connected account

profileUrl.description: Public profile/page URL for the connected account, when it can be derived

imageUrl.description: Profile image URL for the connected account, or null if unavailable

platformMetadata.description: Provider-specific public metadata for this connected account.

profileId.description: Profile this integration belongs to, or null if it was connected without a profile

appId.description: The OAuth app (customer's own OAuth app) this integration was connected under, or null if postpeer's system app was used.

app.description: The OAuth app metadata for BYOK integrations, or null when postpeer system app was used.

byok.description: True when this integration was connected under the customer's own OAuth app (Bring Your Own Keys), i.e. appId is set. False when postpeer's system app is used.

get.summary: Get OAuth URL for a platform
get.description: Initiates an OAuth connection flow. By default, PostPeer hosts any required account selection UI and then returns the user to redirectUri. For LinkedIn custom account-selection UI, pass headless=true; if selection is required, the callback redirects to redirectUri with status=selection_required, platform=linkedin, and selectionToken.

parameters.name: redirectUri
parameters.description: Final URL to redirect to after the connection completes. In headless mode, this URL also receives selection status query parameters when customer-owned account selection is required.

parameters.name: cancelRedirectUri
parameters.description: URL to redirect to when the user cancels or denies the OAuth prompt. Falls back to redirectUri when omitted.

parameters.name: headless
parameters.description: When true, platforms that require account selection redirect back to redirectUri with a short-lived selectionToken so you can build your own selection UI. When false, PostPeer hosts the selection UI.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Profile to associate the resulting integration with. Must belong to the same project. Omit to connect without a profile.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: Connect under your own OAuth app (Bring Your Own Keys). Pass the id of an OAuth app created via /v1/apps for this same platform. Omit to use postpeer's system app.

post.summary: Connect a Bluesky account via app password
post.description: Bluesky has no OAuth redirect. Have the user generate an app password at https://bsky.app/settings/app-passwords, then submit it here.

password.description: An app password generated at https://bsky.app/settings/app-passwords. Do NOT use the account password.

parameters.name: redirectUri
parameters.description: Final URL to redirect to after the connection completes. In headless mode, this URL also receives selection status query parameters when customer-owned account selection is required.

parameters.name: cancelRedirectUri
parameters.description: URL to redirect to when the user cancels or denies the OAuth prompt. Falls back to redirectUri when omitted.

parameters.name: headless
parameters.description: When true, platforms that require account selection redirect back to redirectUri with a short-lived selectionToken so you can build your own selection UI. When false, PostPeer hosts the selection UI.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Profile to associate the resulting integration with. Must belong to the same project. Omit to connect without a profile.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: Connect under your own OAuth app (Bring Your Own Keys). Pass the id of an OAuth app created via /v1/apps for this same platform. Omit to use postpeer's system app.

get.summary: List integrations connected to this project

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Filter to integrations belonging to this profile. Pass "null" (literal string) to filter to integrations with no profile.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive search across the connected account name (displayName), username, and platform user ID.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size (max 100)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of integrations to skip

total.description: Total matched integrations across all pages

id.description: Use this as accountId when creating posts

platformUserId.description: The user ID on the platform, or null if not yet retrieved

username.description: The public username or handle, including @ for handle-based platforms

displayName.description: Human-readable display name of the connected account

profileUrl.description: Public profile/page URL for the connected account, when it can be derived

imageUrl.description: Profile image URL for the connected account, or null if unavailable

platformMetadata.description: Provider-specific public metadata for this connected account.

profileId.description: Profile this integration belongs to, or null if it was connected without a profile

appId.description: The OAuth app (customer's own OAuth app) this integration was connected under, or null if postpeer's system app was used.

app.description: The OAuth app metadata for BYOK integrations, or null when postpeer system app was used.

byok.description: True when this integration was connected under the customer's own OAuth app (Bring Your Own Keys), i.e. appId is set. False when postpeer's system app is used.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Integration ID to disconnect

post.description: Profiles group integrations under a label. Pass the returned `id` as `profileId` when calling /v1/connect/:platform to bind the resulting integration to this profile.

description.description: Optional description of what this profile is for

integrationCount.description: Number of active integrations bound to this profile

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring match on profile name

integrationCount.description: Number of active integrations bound to this profile

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Profile ID

integrationCount.description: Number of active integrations bound to this profile

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Profile ID

integrationCount.description: Number of active integrations bound to this profile

delete.description: Soft-deletes the profile. Existing integrations bound to it keep their profileId — they are not orphaned, but listing /v1/profiles will no longer surface this row.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Profile ID

post.summary: Register your own OAuth app (Bring Your Own Keys)
post.description: Store the client credentials of your own OAuth app for a platform. Pass the returned `id` as `appId` when calling /v1/connect/:platform to connect accounts under it.

name.description: A label for this app (e.g. "Acme Twitter OAuth App")

clientId.description: The client id of your OAuth app for this platform

clientSecret.description: The client secret of your OAuth app. Stored encrypted.

imageUrl.description: Optional icon URL for the app

id.description: Pass this as appId when connecting

clientId.description: The OAuth app client id. The client secret is never returned.

integrationCount.description: Number of active integrations connected under this app

get.summary: List registered OAuth apps for this project

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring match on app name

id.description: Pass this as appId when connecting

clientId.description: The OAuth app client id. The client secret is never returned.

integrationCount.description: Number of active integrations connected under this app

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: OAuth app ID

id.description: Pass this as appId when connecting

clientId.description: The OAuth app client id. The client secret is never returned.

integrationCount.description: Number of active integrations connected under this app

patch.description: Change the name, image, or rotate the client secret. The clientId and platform are immutable: a refresh token is bound to the clientId that issued it, so changing the app would brick existing integrations — create a new OAuth app and reconnect instead.

clientSecret.description: Rotate the stored client secret. The clientId stays the same so existing tokens keep working — to switch to a different app, create a new OAuth app and reconnect.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: OAuth app ID

id.description: Pass this as appId when connecting

clientId.description: The OAuth app client id. The client secret is never returned.

integrationCount.description: Number of active integrations connected under this app

delete.description: Deletes the app. Blocked with 409 while active integrations are still connected under it — those integrations rely on the app for token refresh. Disconnect or reconnect them first.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: OAuth app ID

scheduledFor.description: ISO 8601 datetime to schedule the post for future publishing

timezone.description: IANA timezone for the scheduled time (e.g. America/New_York). Defaults to UTC.

success.description: false only when every platform failed

scheduledFor.description: ISO 8601 datetime the post is scheduled for (only present for scheduled posts)

postId.description: id of the saved Post document

success.description: For publish-now timeout fallback, true means the platform target was accepted and final status is still pending.

platformPostUrl.description: Direct URL to the published post

error.description: Error message when success is false

warningMessage.description: Warning message when the post published but a non-critical follow-up action failed

get.summary: List all posts for the project
get.description: Returns a paginated list of posts. Filter by status, platform (OR logic), and date ranges. Published posts include platformPostUrl per platform.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter by platform (repeatable — OR logic)

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Filter to posts targeting an integration bound to this profile. Pass "null" (literal string) to filter to posts whose integrations have no profile.

parameters.name: createdAfter
parameters.description: ISO 8601 lower bound on createdAt

parameters.name: createdBefore
parameters.description: ISO 8601 upper bound on createdAt

parameters.name: scheduledAfter
parameters.description: ISO 8601 lower bound on scheduledFor

parameters.name: scheduledBefore
parameters.description: ISO 8601 upper bound on scheduledFor

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size (max 100)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of posts to skip

total.description: Total matched posts across all pages

postId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the Post document

content.description: Per-platform text override that was used for this platform. Null when the top-level `content` was used.

platformPostUrl.description: Direct URL to the published post

get.summary: Get a single post by ID

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: Post identifier

postId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the Post document

content.description: Per-platform text override that was used for this platform. Null when the top-level `content` was used.

platformPostUrl.description: Direct URL to the published post

parameters.name: deleteFromPlatforms
parameters.description: When true, also delete supported published platform posts. Costs 1 credit per successful platform deletion.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: Post identifier

get.description: Returns a paginated list of scheduled posts. Use `limit` + `offset` to page through the results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size (max 100)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of scheduled posts to skip

total.description: Total matched scheduled posts across all pages

postId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the Post document

content.description: Post text body

timezone.description: IANA timezone for the scheduled time

thumbnail.description: Thumbnail image URL for video items. Supported on YouTube regular videos (not Shorts). JPEG, PNG, or GIF, max 2 MB, min 640 px wide.

delete.summary: Cancel a scheduled post (moves it back to draft)

patch.summary: Reschedule a post to a new time

scheduledFor.description: New ISO 8601 datetime to schedule the post

post.summary: Get a presigned S3 URL to upload a media file

get.description: With postId, returns analytics for a single post. Without postId, returns a paginated list of published posts with analytics. Accepts both PostPeer post IDs and external platform post IDs (auto-resolved). fromDate defaults to 90 days ago if omitted, max range 366 days. Each call costs 1 credit.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: PostPeer post ID or external platform post ID (auto-resolved). When omitted, returns a paginated list of all published posts with analytics.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Integration ID. Required for external ID lookups and source=platform.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Where the result came from. "postpeer" = posts published via PostPeer (stored in our DB). "platform" = fetched directly from the connected platform account.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Inclusive start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 90 days ago.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: Inclusive end date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort results by this metric

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size (1-100)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number

200.description: Single-post response (when postId is supplied) or paginated list response.

schema.description: Single-post response (when postId is supplied) or paginated list response.

source.description: Where the result came from. "postpeer" = posts published via PostPeer (stored in our DB). "platform" = fetched directly from the connected platform account.

postId.description: PostPeer post ID. null when source=platform (post fetched directly from the platform).

engagementRate.description: Engagement rate (0-1). null when the platform does not report engagement.

platformPostId.description: Native post ID on the platform

platformPostUrl.description: Direct URL to the published post, if known

engagementRate.description: Engagement rate (0-1). null when the platform does not report engagement.

total.description: Total matched posts across all pages

source.description: Where the result came from. "postpeer" = posts published via PostPeer (stored in our DB). "platform" = fetched directly from the connected platform account.

postId.description: PostPeer post ID. null when source=platform (post fetched directly from the platform).

engagementRate.description: Engagement rate (0-1). null when the platform does not report engagement.

platformPostId.description: Native post ID on the platform

platformPostUrl.description: Direct URL to the published post, if known

engagementRate.description: Engagement rate (0-1). null when the platform does not report engagement.

get.description: Returns credit usage history for the project. Without filters, returns project-level totals. Add `profileId` to scope to a specific profile, or `integrationId` to scope to a specific connected account. Use `from`/`to` (YYYY-MM) to slice the history. Each entry contains the monthly credit count and a per-platform breakdown.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Return usage for this profile only. Mutually exclusive with integrationId.

parameters.name: integrationId
parameters.description: Return usage for this integration only. Mutually exclusive with profileId.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive start month (YYYY-MM). Filters the usage history array.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive end month (YYYY-MM). Filters the usage history array.

platform.description: Credits broken down by platform name

balance.description: Current credit balance. Only present on project-level requests (no profileId or integrationId filter).

limit.description: Total monthly credits included in your plan

used.description: Monthly credits used so far this billing cycle

remaining.description: Monthly credits still available this cycle

cycleStart.description: Start of the current billing cycle

cycleEnd.description: End of the current billing cycle — resets here

get.summary: List Pinterest boards for a connected account

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Integration ID of the Pinterest account. If omitted, uses the first connected Pinterest account.

get.summary: Fetch TikTok creator info for a connected account
get.description: Proxies TikTok's /v2/post/publish/creator_info/query/ endpoint. Use the returned `privacyLevelOptions`, `commentDisabled`, `duetDisabled`, `stitchDisabled`, and `maxVideoPostDurationSec` to build a compliant "Post to TikTok" UX.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Integration ID of the TikTok account. If omitted, uses the first connected TikTok account.

creatorAvatarUrl.description: Profile avatar URL returned by TikTok.

privacyLevelOptions.description: Privacy levels available to this creator. Your UX must restrict the privacy dropdown to these values.

commentDisabled.description: If true, the creator has disabled comments in their app settings — grey out the Allow Comment toggle.

duetDisabled.description: If true, the creator has disabled duet in their app settings — grey out the Allow Duet toggle.

stitchDisabled.description: If true, the creator has disabled stitch in their app settings — grey out the Allow Stitch toggle.

maxVideoPostDurationSec.description: Maximum video duration (in seconds) this creator may post. Reject videos longer than this before upload.

post.summary: Generate a social media caption from a description
post.description: Generates a caption tailored to the platforms you'll post to. Costs 2 credits per successful generation. Failed calls do not deduct credits.

description.description: Free-form description of what the post should be about, in the creator's own words.

platforms.description: Platforms this post will target. Used to fit the strictest character limit.

existingContent.description: Optional existing draft to rewrite/improve rather than start from scratch.

post.summary: Generate a social media image from a description
post.description: Generates a square or vertical image suitable for social media. Costs 10 credits per successful generation. Failed calls do not deduct credits.

aspectRatio.description: Output aspect ratio. Defaults to square when omitted.

style.description: Visual style preset. Adds style guidance to the prompt. Omit for the model to pick whatever fits the brief.

referenceImageUrls.description: Reference images. Used as style/vibe inspiration ONLY. The model will not copy them. Useful for "match my brand look" or "same composition as this".

assetImageUrls.description: Asset images that MUST appear in the generated image (e.g. a brand logo, a specific product photo). The model will place them faithfully according to the brief, without redrawing them.

referenceImageUrl.description: DEPRECATED: use referenceImageUrls instead. Still accepted for backwards compatibility.
